  refine ⟨fun h ↦ ?_, fun ⟨r, hr⟩ ↦ hr ▸ Algebra.mem_center_map_of_comm _ r⟩
  let b := Basis.ofVectorSpace k A
  let φ := Algebra.TensorProduct.basisLeft A B b
  have h_center (i) : φ.repr z i ∈ Subring.center B := by
    rw [mem_center_iff]
    intro x
    have := h (1 ⊗ x)
    rw [← φ.sum_repr z] at this
    conv_lhs at this =>
      rw [Finset.sum_mul]
      enter [1, i]
      rw [TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]
    conv_rhs at this =>
      rw [Finset.mul_sum]
      enter [1, i]
      rw [TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]
    apply_fun (fun u ↦ φ.repr u i) at this
    simp only [map_sum, Algebra.TensorProduct.basisLeft_apply, Finsupp.single_apply] at this
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_single i] at this
    · exact this
    · intro j _ hji; simp [hji]
    · intro hi; exact (hi (φ.repr z |>.mem_support_toFun i)).elim
  let c := fun i ↦ Classical.choose ((Algebra.IsCentral.out k B).symm.subset (h_center i))
  have hc (i) : algebraMap k B (c i) = φ.repr z i :=
    Classical.choose_spec ((Algebra.IsCentral.out k B).symm.subset (h_center i))
  refine ⟨∑ i in (φ.repr z).support, c i • b i, ?_⟩
  rw [Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one, map_sum]
  nth_rw 1 [← φ.sum_repr z]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro i _
  rw [TensorProduct.smul_tmul', ← hc i, Algebra.smul_def, Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one,
    TensorProduct.tmul_smul, one_mul]

by
  refine ⟨TensorProduct.includeLeft.injective, fun z hz ↦ ?_⟩
  let b := Basis.ofVectorSpace k A
  let φ := TensorProduct.finsuppScalarLeft b
  have h_comm : ∀ i y, φ z i * y = y * φ z i := fun i y ↦ by
    have H := congr_arg (φ · i) (hz (1 ⊗ₜ y))
    have h1 : φ (z * (1 ⊗ₜ y)) i = φ z i * y := by
      induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on <;>
        simp [*, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_add, add_mul]
    have h2 : φ ((1 ⊗ₜ y) * z) i = y * φ z i := by
      induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on <;>
        simp [*, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_add, add_mul]
    rwa [h1, h2] at H
  use Finsupp.linearCombination k b ((φ z).mapRange (fun x ↦ if h : x ∈ Subring.center B
    then Algebra.IsCentral.out h else 0) (by simp))
  apply φ.injective
  ext i
  simp only [map_sum, Finsupp.linearCombination_apply, Finsupp.sum_apply,
    TensorProduct.finsuppScalarLeft_apply, Finsupp.mapRange_apply, map_smul,
    TensorProduct.tmul_one_eq_coe, Algebra.smul_def, mul_one]
  rw [dif_pos (Subring.mem_center_iff.mpr (h_comm i)), Algebra.IsCentral.out_eq]

by
  constructor
  ext x
  rw [Algebra.mem_bot]
  change x ∈ Subalgebra.center k (A ⊗[k] B)
  rw [Subalgebra.center_tensorProduct, Algebra.IsCentral.out,
    Subalgebra.center_eq_top_of_comm, Subalgebra.map_top, Subalgebra.map_bot,
    sup_bot_eq]
  rfl

by
  constructor
  refine le_antisymm ?_ (Subalgebra.center_ge_range _)
  intro x hx
  rw [Subalgebra.mem_center_iff] at hx
  have : Module.Free k A := Module.Free.of_divisionRing k A
  let b := Module.Free.chooseBasis k A
  let p (i : _) : A ⊗[k] B →ₗ[k] B :=
    TensorProduct.lid k B ∘ₗ TensorProduct.map (b.coord i) LinearMap.id
  have hp (i : _) : ∃ c : k, p i x = algebraMap k B c := by
    have comm (y : B) : p i x * y = y * p i x := by
      have h1 : p i (x * (1 ⊗ₜ y)) = p i x * y := by
        induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
        | zero => simp
        | tmul a w =>
          simp only [p, LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_mk, Function.comp_apply,
            TensorProduct.map_tmul, TensorProduct.lid_tmul, Algebra.id.map_eq_id,
            RingHom.id_apply, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, mul_assoc]
        | add x y hx hy => simp only [map_add, add_mul, hx, hy]
      have h2 : p i ((1 ⊗ₜ y) * x) = y * p i x := by
        induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
        | zero => simp
        | tmul a w =>
          simp only [p, LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_mk, Function.comp_apply,
            TensorProduct.map_tmul, TensorProduct.lid_tmul, Algebra.id.map_eq_id,
            RingHom.id_apply, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, mul_left_comm]
        | add x y hx hy => simp only [map_add, mul_add, hx, hy]
      rw [← h1, ← h2, hx (1 ⊗ₜ y)]
    have : p i x ∈ Subring.center B := by rwa [Subring.mem_center_iff]
    rwa [Algebra.IsCentral.out] at this
  let f : _ →₀ k :=
  { support := (TensorProduct.finsuppScalarLeft b x).support
    toFun := fun i => Classical.choose (hp i)
    mem_support_toFun := by
      intro i
      rw [Ne, ← map_zero (algebraMap k B), (algebraMap k B).injective.eq_iff,
        ← Classical.choose_spec (hp i)]
      exact (TensorProduct.finsuppScalarLeft b x).mem_support_toFun i }
  use b.repr.symm f
  apply (TensorProduct.finsuppScalarLeft b).injective
  ext i
  simp only [TensorProduct.finsuppScalarLeft_apply, LinearEquiv.apply_symm_apply,
    TensorProduct.finsuppScalarLeft_tmul, Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one]
  rw [Classical.choose_spec (hp i)]
  rfl

by
  constructor
  rw [Algebra.TensorProduct.center_eq_range_map_center k A B, Algebra.IsCentral.out k B,
    Subring.center_eq_top, Subring.map_top, Subring.map_range, sup_eq_left]
  rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩
  rw [TensorProduct.includeRightRingHom_apply, ← Algebra.smul_def,
    Algebra.smul_def x (1 : A), ← Algebra.ofId_apply]
  exact Set.mem_range_self _

by
  haveI : Module.Flat k A := Module.Flat.of_free
  constructor
  let ad (y : B) : B →ₗ[k] B := LinearMap.mulRight k B y - LinearMap.mulLeft k B y
  have h_cent : Subring.center B = (⨅ y, LinearMap.ker (ad y)).toSubring := by
    ext; simp [Subring.mem_center_iff, LinearMap.mem_ker, sub_eq_zero, ad]
    exact forall_cong fun y ↦ by rw [eq_comm]
  have h_cent_A : Subring.center (A ⊗[k] B) = (⨅ y, LinearMap.ker ((ad y).baseChange A)).toSubring := by
    ext z
    simp only [Subring.mem_center_iff, Submodule.mem_toSubring, Submodule.mem_iInf,
      LinearMap.mem_ker, LinearMap.baseChange_apply, ad, LinearMap.sub_apply,
      LinearMap.mulRight_apply, LinearMap.mulLeft_apply, sub_eq_zero]
    refine ⟨fun h y ↦ ?_, fun h u ↦ ?_⟩
    · specialize h (1 ⊗ y)
      rw [Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply] at h
      simpa using h
    · induction u using TensorProduct.induction_on with
      | zero => simp
      | tmul a b =>
        rw [show a ⊗[k] b = a • (1 ⊗[k] b) by simp]
        rw [Algebra.commutes_smul]
        · apply h
      | add _ _ h1 h2 => rw [mul_add, add_mul, h1, h2]
  apply Subring.toSubmodule_injective
  simp only [h_cent_A, Submodule.toSubmodule_toSubring]
  rw [← Submodule.baseChange_iInf]
  · rw [← h_cent, Algebra.IsCentral.out, Submodule.range_algebraMap_eq_range_linearMap,
      Subring.toSubmodule_toSubring, LinearMap.range_baseChange]
    exact (Algebra.TensorProduct.range_includeLeft_eq_tensorProduct_range_algebraMap k A B).symm
  · intro y; exact LinearMap.ker_baseChange _ _

by
  constructor
  ext x
  refine ⟨fun hx ↦ ?_, fun ⟨y, hy⟩ ↦ hy ▸ Algebra.range_le_center _ ⟨y, rfl⟩⟩
  let bA := Basis.ofVectorSpace k A
  rw [← bA.sum_repr_tensor x]
  apply Subring.sum_mem
  intro i _
  obtain ⟨c, rfl⟩ : ∃ c, algebraMap k B c = TensorProduct.finsuppScalarLeft bA x i := by
    rw [← Algebra.IsCentral.out, Subring.mem_center_iff]
    intro b
    specialize hx (1 ⊗ₜ[k] b)
    simp only [← bA.sum_repr_tensor x, TensorProduct.sum_tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul,
      ← TensorProduct.sum_tmul_sub, map_sub] at hx
    exact sub_eq_zero.mp ((TensorProduct.linearIndependent_left bA.linearIndependent).eq_zero_of_finite
      (Finset.finite_toSet _) (by simpa using hx) i)
  rw [Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_algebraMap_eq_smul_algebraMap, Algebra.ofId_apply]
  exact Subring.mem_range_self _ _
